items.title: How Apple’s Gemini-Powered Siri Deal Will Impact Alphabet (GOOGL) Investors
items.description: Earlier in January 2026, Apple announced a multi-year partnership with Google to base its next generation of Apple Foundation Models on Google’s Gemini AI and cloud technology, bringing more personalized, AI-powered Siri features while keeping Apple Intelligence workloads on-device and within its Private Cloud Compute framework. The deal effectively places Google’s Gemini at the heart of Apple’s core AI experience, turning a long-time ecosystem rival into a large-scale customer for...

items.title: Intel Rallies Ahead of Earnings. Here's What Analysts Are Saying That's Boosting the Stock.
items.description: Intel shares popped Wednesday, adding to their recent gains amid growing optimism about demand ahead of the chipmaker's earnings report due Thursday.

items.title: Apple to revamp Siri as a built-in chatbot, Bloomberg News reports
items.description: Apple plans to revamp Siri later this year by turning the digital assistant into the ​company's first artificial intelligence chatbot, Bloomberg News reported on ‌Wednesday.  The chatbot, code named Campos, will be embedded deeply into the iPhone, ‌iPad and Mac operating systems and will replace the current Siri interface, the report said, citing people familiar with the plan.  Siri's revamp is a crucial part of Apple's strategy to catch up ⁠to its Big Tech ‌peers in the AI race after its initial "Apple Intelligence" rollout in 2024 met with lukewarm reception.
